import json
d=json.load\(open\('/Users/user_pc/Projetos/BlackBelt/messages/en-US.json'\)\)

")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
for lang in ['pt-BR', 'en-US']:
    d=json.load\(open\(f'/Users/user_pc/Projetos/BlackBelt/messages/{lang}.json'\)\)
    s=d.get\('common',{}\).get\('status',{}\)
    print\(f'{lang} common.status:', list\(s.keys\(\)\) if s else 'MISSING'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
for lang in ['pt-BR', 'en-US']:
    d=json.load\(open\(f'/Users/user_pc/Projetos/BlackBelt/messages/{lang}.json'\)\)
    a=d.get\('common',{}\).get\('actions',{}\)
    print\(f'{lang}: entering={a.get\(\\"entering\\",\\"MISSING\\"\)}, loading={a.get\(\\"loading\\",\\"MISSING\\"\)}, redirecting={a.get\(\\"redirecting\\",\\"MISSING\\"\)}'\)
")
